title: League of Legends Patch 26.14 Notes
overview: Patch 26.14 celebrates T1's Worlds three-peat with mostly small-scale balance tuning: mage and marksman touch-ups, a handful of nerfs to overperformers like Senna, Seraphine, and Garen, item retuning around Hextech Rocketbelt, and a jungle-priority Blue Buff change.
summary: Senna and Seraphine get their AP scaling clipped — support carries eat a nerf.
Garen and Jayce lose lane pressure; Azir, Corki, Mordekaiser, and Nami get help.
Hextech Rocketbelt is rebuilt with a new path, weaker burst, and a longer active cooldown.
Blue Buff now scales its ability haste with game time, rewarding junglers who take it late.

champions.summary: Soldier on-hit rune interactions fixed and buffed
champions.details: Arise! soldiers now deal 100% of Scorch, Liandry's, Blackfire Torch, and Hextech Alternator damage on-hit (was 50%), apply 2 Conqueror stacks, and Emperor's Divide knocks back jungle monsters, so your DPS and rune value finally count for full.
champions.name: Azir

champions.summary: AD growth and rocket recharge improved
champions.details: Attack Damage growth rises from 2 to 2.5 and Missile Barrage now recharges 2-6 seconds faster with crit chance (was 2-4), so a crit-built Corki keeps his package stocked more often.
champions.name: Corki

champions.summary: E damage and ult stat steal increased
champions.details: Death's Grasp now deals up to 140 (+45% AP) and Realm of Death steals 13% of your victim's stats (was 10%), making his 1v1 duels in the death realm noticeably scarier.
champions.name: Mordekaiser

champions.details: Tidecaller's Blessing empowered-attack damage scales up to 80 at max rank (was 60), giving Nami's poke and her ADC's trades a bit more sting.
champions.name: Nami

champions.details: Attack Damage growth goes from 2.5 to 3, so Yunara scales a touch harder into the mid and late game.
champions.name: Yunara

champions.details: Demacian Justice's flat true damage drops from 150/250/350 to 125/200/275, so Garen's signature execute needs a bit more setup to close out a kill.
champions.name: Garen

champions.summary: Passive move speed and ult resistances cut
champions.details: Hextech Capacitor bonus move speed falls from 40 to 30 and Mercury Hammer's armor/MR shrinks to 5/12/19/26, making Jayce squishier and less slippery when he swaps stances.
champions.name: Jayce

champions.summary: Q and W damage and uptime reduced
champions.details: Ritual Nails' recast window drops to 4 seconds with lower nail and mark damage, and Soul Ignition's grey-health cap falls to 40/70/100/130/160, trimming Locke's sustained trading power.
champions.name: Locke

champions.summary: Crit modifier and Q AP scaling cut
champions.details: Absolution's crit damage modifier drops to 80% and Piercing Darkness' AP slow and heal ratios are reduced, reining in AP-Senna's runaway healing and utility.
champions.name: Senna

champions.details: High Note's AP ratio drops from 50% to 40%, so Seraphine's main poke does less as she stacks AP.
champions.name: Seraphine

items.summary: Rebuilt with new path and weaker active
items.details: Rocketbelt now builds from Hextech Alternator + Kindlegem + Ruby Crystal with 60 AP, 350 health, and a 50-second dash cooldown, trading raw AP for more durability and a slower gap-closer.
items.name: Hextech Rocketbelt

items.details: The above-50%-health damage bonus drops to 4% and the below-50% healing/shielding bonus to 12%, softening the item's swingy execute-and-survive profile.
items.name: Immortal Path

items.summary: More expensive with weaker low-end stats
items.details: Cost rises to 2600 with lower minimum health (100-300) and healing (100-400), so early Protoplasm buyers get less value for the extra gold.
items.name: Protoplasm Harness

systems.summary: Blue Buff ability haste now scales with level
systems.details: Blue Buff grants 10/15/20 ability haste at levels 1/6/11 instead of a flat 10, giving junglers and mid laners a stronger reason to prioritize it as the game goes on.

Dropkick, Tooth Fairy, and Infernal Conduit are nerfed while Dimension Shift, Poro Stampede, and Squishy Slappy Grab get buffed and a new Overkill execute augment is added, reshuffling which ARAM augments are worth taking.
Gragas, Illaoi, Samira, Zoe and others get buffs while Ambessa's Q ratios are cut, and duelist items like Phantom Dancer and Kraken Slayer gain attack speed, shifting the Arena power picks.
Low-signal buffs are trimmed, item durations moved to your inventory, and very short debuffs hidden, so the buff bar shows the information that actually matters mid-fight.
